question: Write a C++ function `bool areMatricesEqual(int mat1[ROWS][COLS], int mat2[ROWS][COLS], int rows, int cols)` that checks if two 2D integer matrices are identical. Demonstrate with example matrices in `main`.
errors: The function `areMatricesEqual` incorrectly returns `true` if any single element matches, instead of ensuring all elements match. It should only return `true` after iterating through all specified elements without finding a mismatch.
